title: Junior Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
